follow_ups.title: Evaluate Qwen3-ASR 0.6B and 1.7B on the same local WAV set
follow_ups.reason: Fun-ASR-Nano improves speed and average CER but still struggles with technical/product names and repeated `语音` -> `云` errors.

follow_ups.title: Investigate Fun-ASR-Nano VAD, streaming, hotword, and GGUF runtime options
follow_ups.reason: The validated adapter is file-level only and disables VAD on FunASR 1.3.1 due to `KeyError(0)` in `inference_with_vad`.
